message:
feat(fp-frame): add DataFrame.ewm().sum() parity (frankenpandas-fcck)

Wires Series::ewm().sum() (landed in frankenpandas-8dru) through the
DataFrameEwm apply_ewm harness so the DataFrame surface exposes the
same recursive weighted-sum reducer as mean/std/var. Non-numeric
columns are skipped (same policy as the existing reducers).

Tests: df_ewm_sum_per_column verifies the recursive formula on two
columns with alpha=0.5; df_ewm_sum_skips_non_numeric_columns
confirms Utf8 columns are dropped from the result frame without
erroring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
